resourceTemplates.name: lmmarketcap-model-detail
resourceTemplates.title: Get LM Market Cap model detail
resourceTemplates.description: Returns full profile for a model including pricing, scores, categories and aliases.

resourceTemplates.name: lmmarketcap-model-scores
resourceTemplates.title: Get model score history
resourceTemplates.description: Returns time series of model scores with optional category and date filtering.

resourceTemplates.name: lmmarketcap-model-signals
resourceTemplates.title: Get model signals
resourceTemplates.description: Returns raw signal events contributing to a model score.

resourceTemplates.name: lmmarketcap-model-reviews
resourceTemplates.title: Get model reviews
resourceTemplates.description: Returns community reviews for a model with pagination and sorting.

resourceTemplates.name: lmmarketcap-model-pricing
resourceTemplates.title: Get model pricing
resourceTemplates.description: Returns current pricing and pricing history for a model.

resourceTemplates.name: lmmarketcap-category-detail
resourceTemplates.title: Get category detail
resourceTemplates.description: Returns metadata for a category including children and model count.

resourceTemplates.name: lmmarketcap-rankings
resourceTemplates.title: Get category rankings
resourceTemplates.description: Returns leaderboard ranking for a category.

resourceTemplates.name: lmmarketcap-ranking-history
resourceTemplates.title: Get ranking history
resourceTemplates.description: Returns historical ranking snapshots for a category.

resourceTemplates.name: lmmarketcap-ranking-movers
resourceTemplates.title: Get ranking movers
resourceTemplates.description: Returns largest ranking changes for a category.

resourceTemplates.name: lmmarketcap-search-models
resourceTemplates.title: Search models
resourceTemplates.description: Typo tolerant search across model names, aliases and descriptions.

resourceTemplates.name: lmmarketcap-compare-models
resourceTemplates.title: Compare models
resourceTemplates.description: Compare multiple models across scores, pricing and metadata.
